title: Unified Market Record
description: Exchange-agnostic market record for client.markets(). Normalizes Kalshi and Polymarket contracts into a common schema with an 'exchange' discriminator field.

market_ticker.description: Unique market identifier within the exchange.

exchange.description: Exchange. Use for routing to exchange-specific API clients.

series_ticker.description: Parent series (Kalshi) or condition ID group (Polymarket).

settlement_date.description: Settlement date (YYYY-MM-DD LST) for weather markets.

station.description: NWS station code for weather markets.

yes_last.description: Last trade price for YES (0-100 cents).

result.description: Settlement result ('yes'/'no'). Null = not yet settled.

exchange_raw.description: Original exchange-native record (for debugging). Not normalized.

$comment: MULTI-EXCHANGE ABSTRACTION: The 'exchange' field is the discriminator. Normalization rules: (1) Kalshi prices are in cents [0-100]. (2) Polymarket prices are probabilities [0.0-1.0] — normalize to cents by multiplying by 100. (3) volume and open_interest are contract counts for both exchanges. (4) settlement_date is always in LST for weather markets. STUB: client.markets() raises NotImplementedError until Sprint 3.
